title: Cobblemon Green
description: This modpack adds some QoL features which are useful to have when playing on Cobblemon Green, the oldest Cobblemon Minecraft server!
body:
**Having been around since cobblemon 1.0, green is proud to be the oldest cobblemon server out there!**

---
Green not only offers a never resetting world full of history, but has never been and will never become P2W! The server offers a more laid-back experience, but doesn't fail to engage in competition either. Join us for weekly cobblemon tournaments and other events such as photo contests and our very own sumo minigame!

**This lightweight modpack aims to improve your experience on the server!**

---
While our 1 TB map can be explored with just the base cobblemon mod, this modpack adds quite a few QoL changes. Key features include a fully configured Xaero's (mini)map for finding Pokémon, the ability to effortlessly view Pokémon IVs with MoreCobblemonTweaks and increased game performance. Never worry about forgetting a crafting recipe or missing a shiny Pokémon again by using this modpack!
